title: Create: Wider Windows
description: Wider Windows & More Visible Fluids for 2x2 fluid tanks
body:
![Four 2x2 fluid tanks, showcasing the wider windows added by the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6f8aa4100967b53733ecc708acce723ba6c772d.png)

Create: Wider Windows changes Create's 2x2 fluid tanks to have wider windows so you can view your fluids with ease. It does not modify 1x1 and 3x3 fluid tanks due to how the fluid tank model works. 

This is a direct edit of Create's original fluid tank model.
